name: Chocolate Macaroons Vlf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot, mix brown sugar and fat-free soy milk.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract and coconut extract.
4. Stir in cocoa powder until blended.
5. Mix in rolled oats until a very stiff dough forms.
6. Spoon the batter onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Refrigerate for 20 minutes before serving.
